Interface ExtensionRegistry

public interface ExtensionRegistry
Registry for managing extension points and their implementations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> Optional<T>
    getExtension(String extensionPointId)
    Gets the highest priority extension for an extension point.
    List<String>
    getExtensionPointIds()
    Gets all registered extension point IDs.
    <T> List<T>
    getExtensions(String extensionPointId)
    Gets all extensions for an extension point, ordered by priority (highest first).
    boolean
    hasExtensionPoint(String extensionPointId)
    Checks if an extension point is registered.
    default <T> void
    registerExtension(String extensionPointId, T extension)
    Registers an extension with default priority (0).
    <T> void
    registerExtension(String extensionPointId, T extension, int priority)
    Registers an extension implementation.
    <T> void
    registerExtensionPoint(String extensionPointId, Class<T> extensionPointClass)
    Registers an extension point.
    <T> void
    unregisterExtension(String extensionPointId, T extension)
    Unregisters an extension.

  • Method Details

    • registerExtensionPoint

      <T> void registerExtensionPoint(String extensionPointId, Class<T> extensionPointClass)
      Registers an extension point.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the extension point type
      Parameters:
      extensionPointId - the unique ID of the extension point
      extensionPointClass - the extension point interface/class

    • registerExtension

      <T> void registerExtension(String extensionPointId, T extension, int priority)
      Registers an extension implementation.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the extension type
      Parameters:
      extensionPointId - the extension point ID
      extension - the extension implementation
      priority - the priority (higher values = higher priority)

    • registerExtension

      default <T> void registerExtension(String extensionPointId, T extension)
      Registers an extension with default priority (0).
      Type Parameters:
      T - the extension type
      Parameters:
      extensionPointId - the extension point ID
      extension - the extension implementation

    • unregisterExtension

      <T> void unregisterExtension(String extensionPointId, T extension)
      Unregisters an extension.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the extension type
      Parameters:
      extensionPointId - the extension point ID
      extension - the extension to remove

    • getExtensions

      <T> List<T> getExtensions(String extensionPointId)
      Gets all extensions for an extension point, ordered by priority (highest first).
      Type Parameters:
      T - the extension type
      Parameters:
      extensionPointId - the extension point ID
      Returns:
      list of extensions, or empty list if none found

    • getExtension

      <T> Optional<T> getExtension(String extensionPointId)
      Gets the highest priority extension for an extension point.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the extension type
      Parameters:
      extensionPointId - the extension point ID
      Returns:
      the highest priority extension, or empty if none found

    • getExtensionPointIds

      List<String> getExtensionPointIds()
      Gets all registered extension point IDs.
      Returns:
      list of extension point IDs

    • hasExtensionPoint

      boolean hasExtensionPoint(String extensionPointId)
      Checks if an extension point is registered.
      Parameters:
      extensionPointId - the extension point ID
      Returns:
      true if registered, false otherwise
